title: Repository, Python Runtime, Dependencies, Parsers, and Reproducibility
description: The crawler runs from an unknown revision with floating packages, an undocumented parser, no license inventory, and no clean-environment proof. Learners cumulatively produce reproducible crawler repository baseline through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Inspect revision, status, existing behavior, tests, configuration, data fixtures, licenses, secrets, and a recovery anchor before editing.
Record Python implementation and version, platform, SSL backend, event-loop assumptions, encoding environment, and supported runtime matrix.
Pin direct and resolved dependencies, verify hashes and sources, review licenses and advisories, and prove clean installation.
